purpose: Primary-source evidence for the ATV340 frozen truth-set: the drawing + official Schneider manuals used to verify each retained blocker, and the auditable D1 reversal. Official Schneider sources only (download.schneider-electric.com); no reseller/forum/generic-knowledge sources.

primary_sources.title: ATV340 S1, S2 & S3 Wiring Diagrams
Altivar Machine ATV340 Variable Speed Drives Installation Manual

verifications.table_or_section: "Drive Frame Sizes 1...3 - Top Side CN3 Connector" (Arrangement and Characteristics of Control Block Terminals)
verifications.excerpt: ENC ... Digital encoder 5V RS422 A/B/I ... Analog encoder 1Vpp sin/cos. (p.133: RS422/RS485, Rin 121 Ohm, 1 Mbit)
verifications.reviewer_note: CN3/ENC legitimately supports RS422; RS422 is Schneider's shared differential standard across CN3/CN4/CN5, not CN4-exclusive. Independently re-verified in the downloaded PDF (sha256 8544403d...) — see reversal_note.

verifications.excerpt: S3 braking resistor connects CN8:PB <-> CN9:PA/+; S1&S2 braking resistor connects CN10:PBe <-> CN10:PB.

verifications.table_or_section: Wiring the Power Part > Functions of the Power Terminals
verifications.excerpt: PB terminal location varies by frame (CN10 for S1/S2, CN8 for S3); CN9 (PA/+, PC/-) is IDENTICAL across frames. Duplicate CN9:PA/+ / CN9:PC/- = same terminal (de-duplicate), not frame-qualify.
CN9 PA/+ = DC bus + polarity; PC/- = DC bus - polarity; braking = CN10:PB-PBe (S1/S2) or CN9:PA/+ - CN8:PB (S3). PC/- is in neither brake loop.
CN6 outputs are labeled DQCOM, DQ1, DQ2 (graph's DO1/DO2 is the misread).

reversal_note: D1 was REVERSED after primary-source verification. The initial drawing-only reading concluded RS422-on-CN3 was a defect; the official Installation Manual (NVE61069.06 p.132) shows CN3 legitimately supports a 5V RS422 A/B/I digital encoder. The incorrect_connector_ownership blocker was removed; variant_crossover (redundant with incompatible_functional_path; CN9 is not frame-variable) and dangling_reference (CN3 is a real connector) were also removed. Five drawing/manual-confirmed blockers retained; the reduced set independently preserves import_verdict=FAIL. Verification used Sonnet evidence-review agents + independent in-PDF confirmation by the orchestrator; se.com FAQ pages returned HTTP 403 and are NOT cited.
